ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-20-2018 Continued To Feb-26-19 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES:
Vivian Lerche, Esq. specially appearing for the plaintiff. The Order To Show Cause is re-set to FEB-26-2019 at 10:30am in Department 610. Judge: TERI L. JACKSON; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Proceedings not reported.
